options.label: A
options.text: How much energy is wasted as heat

options.label: B
options.text: The ratio of useful energy output to total energy input

options.label: C
options.text: The total amount of energy used by a device

options.label: D
options.text: How quickly a device transfers energy

explanation: Energy efficiency compares how much useful energy a device produces to how much total energy it uses. A more efficient device wastes less energy (often as heat) and converts a larger fraction of input energy into useful work.
